body.title: Centralized logging: logging_setup routes igor.tools.* to per-tool log files
body.result: logging_setup.py auto-scans tools/ at boot, registers per-tool RotatingFileHandler for igor.tools.<name> logger + tree_index. Removed _flog() and _LOG_FILE from 10 files (pe_chain, goal_continuation, boredom_idle, after_action_reviewer, escalation_stats, stale_task_reaper, scope_guard, or_model_refresh, memory_snapshot, tree_index). All log.info() calls now route to both tools.log and <name>.log. 1852/1852 tests pass. Commit bff4b5c4.
body.description: Eliminate _flog() pattern across all tools. logging_setup.py should auto-attach a file handler for any igor.tools.<name> logger writing to ~/.TheIgors/logs/<name>.log. Tools use logging.getLogger(__name__) only — one call, goes to console (rich) + tool-specific log file. Audit all tools with _flog and remove them. Not changing: log file locations, logging_setup interface, rich console path.
